title: MCPE Showcase
subtitle: A collection of high-performance Minecraft SMP landing pages.

projects.name: MAFR SMP

projects.name: CHALINCE SMP
projects.desc: Community, Connection, Hero, and Rules sections with responsive design and animations.

projects.name: Zenoria MC
projects.desc: Header, Hero, Ranks, Rules, and Social sections for high-end server feel.

projects.name: Moonfall Server
projects.desc: Optimized landing page with real-time WhatsApp order link integration.

projects.name: Vixa Network
projects.desc: Staff section and themed server components for network-scale servers.

projects.name: Lentera SMP
projects.desc: Centralized configuration for server details and assets management.

projects.name: NestCraft Network
projects.desc: SEO and PWA support with manifest, robots.txt, and sitemap.xml.

projects.name: EVERY SMP
projects.desc: Refactored code structure for improved readability and maintenance.

projects.name: Papik SMP
projects.desc: Header, Hero, Important Links, and Server Info sections.

projects.name: Ambalabu SMP
projects.desc: React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS initialization for modern servers.

projects.name: DOAINGMC
projects.desc: Next generation server portal for the DoaingMC community.
